summary: Production build passes clean (34 routes, 4 pages). Fixed not-found.tsx Server Component build error. Added upfront env var validation on blueprint/generate (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) and payments/create-intent (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY) routes. Comprehensive .env.example with 30 vars grouped by category with setup instructions. Admin setup page now checks 25 env vars across 6 groups including Admin & Security and Enrichment. No hardcoded localhost (all dynamic via NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL). Ready for Monday demo.
nextSteps: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL to production URL before deploy
Test full scan flow on production
